title: 宝塚記念の後に・届いた指先

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature receives praise from Mejiro McQueen
and Mejiro Ryan after giving it her all to win the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature is inspired by how their motivation
for the next race remains unfazed by defeat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Convinced that she can now run well in a bigger
race, I suggest that she run in the autumn Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mustering up the strength to keep herself from
falling back to her reluctant ways, Nice Nature
makes up her mind to tackle the big race.
